task_completion.description: Create the conditions CSV file with columns 'stimulus', 'condition', 'corrAns' and at least 4 rows of congruent/incongruent trials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet or text editor showing the CSV file with the required columns ('stimulus', 'condition', 'corrAns') and at least 4 rows of arrow stimuli (e.g., >>>>>, <<><<).

task_completion.description: Create the required routines (instruction, fixation, trial, end) and arrange them in the experiment flow.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PsychoPy Builder flow panel at the bottom of the screen showing an instruction routine, a loop encompassing fixation and trial routines, and an end routine.

task_completion.description: Configure the loop with at least 2 repetitions and link the conditions CSV file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The loop properties dialog showing `nReps` set to 2 (or more) and the 'Conditions' field pointing to `flanker_conditions.csv`, with the parameters summary showing `stimulus`, `condition`, and `corrAns`.

task_completion.description: Configure the trial routine to display the stimulus using the variable from the conditions file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Text component properties dialog in the trial routine showing the text field set to `$stimulus` (or equivalent variable name) and the update dropdown set to 'set every repeat'.

task_completion.description: Configure the trial routine to record keyboard responses and evaluate correctness.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Keyboard component properties dialog in the trial routine showing 'Store correct' checked and the 'Correct answer' field set to `$corrAns`.

integrity.description: The agent used the PsychoPy Builder GUI to construct the experiment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the PsychoPy Builder interface (adding routines, components, editing properties).

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by writing the .psyexp file directly using a script or text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal commands or text editor windows containing raw XML/JSON PsychoPy experiment code.

integrity.description: The agent saved the files to the exact requested paths.
integrity.visual_evidence: Save dialogs, file manager windows, or PsychoPy window titles confirming the paths /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/flanker_task.psyexp and /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/flanker_conditions.csv.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified requirements: The experiment file must be saved to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/flanker_task.psyexp. The conditions file must be saved to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/flanker_conditions.csv. The conditions file must contain at least 4 trials. The experiment loop must be configured with at least 2 repetitions (nReps >= 2).
